proposals.motive: Integrating automated testing frameworks will improve reliability by ensuring code is tested consistently.
proposals.diff:
diff --git a/package.json b/package.json
index 3e979ea..5e52b63 100644
--- a/package.json
+++ b/package.json
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@
   "scripts": {
     "start": "ts-node src/index.ts",
     "dev": "ts-node-dev --respawn --transpile-only src/index.ts",
-    "test": "echo \"Error: no test specified\" && exit 1"
+    "test": "jest"
   },
   "keywords": [],
   "author": "AngelReml",
